title: Career Opportunity Teacher at Pratham Education

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Teacher at Pratham Education
jsonLd.description:
Join the Pratham Education family as a Teacher in Pune. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Pratham Education:
Pratham Education is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pratham Education!
